temporal_description:
A shaky, close-up shot focuses on a young woman with messy, damp-looking hair. She wears a dark denim jacket over a red hoodie. Her expression is one of intense anger and determination as she glares forward. The background is a dark, cluttered, and chaotic room, filled with an assortment of antique furniture and objects, all in shadow. A watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible in the top-left corner. The audio opens with a young man's voice, filled with intense anger and a protective, aggressive tone, shouting, "You dare hit my girlfriend, you idiot!" His voice is loud and forceful, conveying a sense of extreme frustration and rage. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, reading, "敢打我女朋友 你个白痴!".

Immediately following his outburst, a loud, heavy, and chaotic crashing sound erupts, suggesting a violent impact or a large object being thrown and breaking amidst a cacophony of clatter and debris. The camera pulls back to a wider, high-angle shot, revealing the full scope of the disarray. The young woman stands on the left side of the frame, looking towards the center of the room. In the middle of the dark, cluttered space, a man is seen falling backward onto a pile of furniture. The room is a chaotic jumble of old chairs, tables, and other indistinct items, all dimly lit and creating a sense of disorder. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top-left corner. The camera remains stationary, capturing the aftermath of the man's fall.
